title: SHARD: Self-Healing Agent with Resilient Delegation
description: Four independent infrastructure components (persistent memory, scheduled automation, background delegation, and self-learning) compose to enable emergent behaviors—including self-healing, autonomous improvement, and multi-session orchestration—that none could produce alone. We present SHARD, an application architecture built on the MeshClaw framework, demonstrating how composable agent infrastructure enables robust autonomous operation without monolithic design.
